Tests that the cosine of Infinity is NaN using an assertion.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `Math.cos` function when passed `Infinity` as an argument. The assertion checks that the result of `Math.cos(Infinity)` is `NaN` (Not-a-Number). This test ensures that the `Math.cos` function conforms to expected mathematical behavior when handling infinite values. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on this single mathematical edge case.
